property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\zulu17.62.17-ca-jdk17.0.17-win_x64\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\cless\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\local\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\cless\bin;C:\Program Files\IDE\eclipse\plugins\org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.9.v20251105-0741\jre\bin\server;C:\Program Files\IDE\eclipse\plugins\org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.9.v20251105-0741\jre\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\zulu17.62.17-ca-jdk17.0.17-win_x64\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\dotnet;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Users\cless\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python37\Scripts;C:\Users\cless\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python37;C:\Users\cless\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm Community Edition 2020.2.3\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2023.1.3\bin;C:\Users\cless\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\cless\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\IDE\eclipse;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\vendor_perl;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\core_perl;.

testcase.name: Acesso ao blog e abertura da busca
testcase.classname: Busca no blog do Agibank via lupa
testcase.system-out: @all @search @web Scenario: Acesso ao blog e abertura da busca # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:4 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· When ele clica na lupa de busca â†· Then o campo de busca deve ser exibido corretamente
testcase.system-err: mar. 18, 2026 4:18:21 PM io.cucumber.core.options.CucumberPropertiesParser lambda$warnWhenCucumberOptionsIsUsed$2 ADVERTÊNCIA: Passing commandline options via the property 'cucumber.options' is no longer supported. Please use individual properties instead. See the java doc on io.cucumber.core.options.Constants for details. [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 146.0.7680.80 (resolved driver for Chrome 146) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as C:\Users\cless\.cache\selenium\chromedriver\win64\146.0.7680.80\chromedriver.exe Starting ChromeDriver 146.0.7680.80 (f08938029c887ea624da7a1717059788ed95034d-refs/branch-heads/7680_65@{#34}) on port 62962 Only local connections are allowed. Please see https://chromedriver.chromium.org/security-considerations for suggestions on keeping ChromeDriver safe. ChromeDriver was started successfully on port 62962. mar. 18, 2026 4:18:24 PM org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake createSession INFORMAÇÕES: Detected upstream dialect: W3C mar. 18, 2026 4:18:24 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 146, so returning the closest version found: a no-op implementation mar. 18, 2026 4:18:24 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch INFORMAÇÕES: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146. mar. 18, 2026 4:18:24 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$3 ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find version of CDP to use for . You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.4.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Busca por produtos principais do banco #1
testcase.classname: Busca no blog do Agibank via lupa
testcase.system-out: @all @search @core @web Scenario Outline: Busca por produtos principais do banco # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:19 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· And clica na lupa de busca â†· When ele busca por "emprestimo consignado" â†· Then os resultados devem conter conteudos relacionados a "emprestimo" â†· And pelo menos 3 resultados devem ser exibidos
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 146.0.7680.80 (resolved driver for Chrome 146) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as C:\Users\cless\.cache\selenium\chromedriver\win64\146.0.7680.80\chromedriver.exe Starting ChromeDriver 146.0.7680.80 (f08938029c887ea624da7a1717059788ed95034d-refs/branch-heads/7680_65@{#34}) on port 54151 Only local connections are allowed. Please see https://chromedriver.chromium.org/security-considerations for suggestions on keeping ChromeDriver safe. ChromeDriver was started successfully on port 54151. mar. 18, 2026 4:18:30 PM org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake createSession INFORMAÇÕES: Detected upstream dialect: W3C mar. 18, 2026 4:18:30 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 146, so returning the closest version found: a no-op implementation mar. 18, 2026 4:18:30 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch INFORMAÇÕES: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146. mar. 18, 2026 4:18:30 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$3 ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find version of CDP to use for . You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.4.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Validar relevancia dos resultados para emprestimo
testcase.classname: Busca no blog do Agibank via lupa
testcase.system-out: @all @search @relevance @web Scenario: Validar relevancia dos resultados para emprestimo # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:26 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· And clica na lupa de busca â†· When ele busca por "emprestimo" â†· Then os 3 primeiros resultados devem conter termos relacionados a emprestimo â†· And nao deve haver conteudos irrelevantes nas primeiras posicoes

testcase.name: Validar ordenacao por data para busca especifica
testcase.classname: Busca no blog do Agibank via lupa
testcase.system-out: @all @search @ordering @web Scenario: Validar ordenacao por data para busca especifica # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:34 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· And clica na lupa de busca â†· When ele busca por "emprestimo pessoal" â†· Then os resultados devem estar ordenados por data decrescente

testcase.name: Validar consistencia de ordenacao para cartao
testcase.classname: Busca no blog do Agibank via lupa
testcase.system-out: @all @search @inconsistency @web Scenario: Validar consistencia de ordenacao para cartao # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:41 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· And clica na lupa de busca â†· When ele busca por "cartao" â†· Then os resultados devem manter um criterio consistente de ordenacao â†· And nao devem exibir conteudos muito antigos antes dos mais recentes

testcase.name: Validar paginacao dos resultados
testcase.classname: Busca no blog do Agibank via lupa
testcase.system-out: @all @search @pagination @web Scenario: Validar paginacao dos resultados # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:49 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· And clica na lupa de busca â†· When ele busca por "pix" â†· And acessa a proxima pagina de resultados â†· Then novos resultados devem ser exibidos â†· And nao deve repetir os resultados da pagina anterior

testcase.name: Validar abertura de artigo a partir da busca
testcase.classname: Busca no blog do Agibank via lupa
testcase.system-out: @all @search @content @web Scenario: Validar abertura de artigo a partir da busca # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:58 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· And clica na lupa de busca â†· When ele busca por "emprestimo pessoal" â†· And clica em um dos resultados â†· Then o artigo deve ser carregado corretamente â†· And o titulo deve corresponder ao resultado clicado

testcase.name: Validar busca por termos relacionados (intencao) #1
testcase.classname: Busca no blog do Agibank via lupa
testcase.system-out: @all @search @semantic @web Scenario Outline: Validar busca por termos relacionados (intencao) # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:75 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· And clica na lupa de busca â†· When ele busca por "preciso de dinheiro" â†· Then os resultados devem conter conteudos relacionados a emprestimo
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 146.0.7680.80 (resolved driver for Chrome 146) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as C:\Users\cless\.cache\selenium\chromedriver\win64\146.0.7680.80\chromedriver.exe Starting ChromeDriver 146.0.7680.80 (f08938029c887ea624da7a1717059788ed95034d-refs/branch-heads/7680_65@{#34}) on port 50459 Only local connections are allowed. Please see https://chromedriver.chromium.org/security-considerations for suggestions on keeping ChromeDriver safe. ChromeDriver was started successfully on port 50459. mar. 18, 2026 4:19:28 PM org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake createSession INFORMAÇÕES: Detected upstream dialect: W3C mar. 18, 2026 4:19:28 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 146, so returning the closest version found: a no-op implementation mar. 18, 2026 4:19:28 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch INFORMAÇÕES: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146. mar. 18, 2026 4:19:28 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$3 ADVERTÊNCIA: Unable to find version of CDP to use for . You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.4.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Validar busca por termos relacionados (intencao) #2

testcase.system-out: @all @search @semantic @web Scenario Outline: Validar busca por termos relacionados (intencao) # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:76 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· And clica na lupa de busca â†· When ele busca por "como conseguir credito" â†· Then os resultados devem conter conteudos relacionados a emprestimo

testcase.name: Validar busca com caracteres especiais #1
testcase.classname: Busca no blog do Agibank via lupa
testcase.system-out: @all @search @robustness @web Scenario Outline: Validar busca com caracteres especiais # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:89 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· And clica na lupa de busca â†· When ele busca por "emprestimo!!!" â†· Then o sistema nao deve apresentar erro â†· And os resultados devem ser exibidos de forma controlada

testcase.name: Validar busca com entradas invalidas #1
testcase.classname: Busca no blog do Agibank via lupa
testcase.system-out: @all @search @edge @web Scenario Outline: Validar busca com entradas invalidas # src/test/resources/features/agblog.feature:104 â– Given que o usuario acessa o blog do Agibank â†· And clica na lupa de busca â†· When ele busca por "" â†· Then o sistema deve tratar a busca corretamente â†· And nao deve apresentar falha ou quebra de layout
